title: sterculia thorelii
intro: Sterculia thorelii, also known as the Tiger's Eye Tree or Tiger Eye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia thorelii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing oxidative stress. The plant's medicinal properties can be extracted through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
